name: Fraction relative-value order — prospective prediction vs Anetaki II face-δ six-fraction sequence
ordinal: third Anetaki-targeting seal (after ANETAKI_FINAL_EDITION_DELTA_SEAL and M_ANETAKI_LATTICE_DELTA_SEAL; overlap: none — those seals score sign-groups/lattice deltas, this one scores ONLY the face-δ fraction ordering)
claim_layer: L2/L3 numeral-notation structure (klasmatogram relative-value order); no semantic/lexical/phonetic content; no transfer licence claimed or consumed
held_out_target: Anetaki II (Kanta ed., INSTAP Academic Press, forthcoming) editio princeps reading of KN Zg 58 Face δ: six different fraction signs in sequence (existence public via Kanta et al. 2024 pp. 41-42; identities and order UNPUBLISHED)
public_surface_at_freeze: This sequence of fractions is a most important aspect of this document.
known_leak_discounted: Kanta et al. 2024 p.42 publicly implies >=1 discordance with Corazza 2021; predictions of the form 'Corazza has an error' earn zero credit; only pair-level directions committed here are scoreable

our_prediction.channel: corpus/silver multi-sign fraction sequence tokens (descending-order convention A-FD1) + arithmetic anchors J=1/2 (Bennett 1950), E=1/4 (JE additive); Corazza-independent

pairwise_matrix_primary.basis: J=1/2 Bennett 1950 (HT104,HTZd156,PE1,HT123a); E=1/4 via JE=3/4 additive
J=1/2 Bennett 1950 (HT104,HTZd156,PE1,HT123a); E=1/4 via JE=3/4 additive
J=1/2 Bennett 1950 (HT104,HTZd156,PE1,HT123a); E=1/4 via JE=3/4 additive

our_prediction.abstention: pairs absent from the matrix are ABSTAIN; they never score

corazza_prediction.citation: Corazza, Ferrara, Montecchi, Tamburini & Valério (2021), 'The mathematical values of fraction signs in the Linear A script: a computational, statistical and typological approach', J. Archaeol. Sci. 125:105214, doi:10.1016/j.jas.2020.105214. Tier-2 values flagged uncertain/composite by the authors (H?, A?, W=BB?, X=AA?).
corazza_prediction.verified: 2026-07-08 against a secondary source reproducing the paper's table; identical to repo scripts/comparison/metrology.py::CORAZZA_2021

ground_truth_hierarchy: G1: ed.pr. explicitly printed relative-value ordering
G2: written sequence order under descending convention (editors' stated reading direction)
scoring_rule.sub1_primary: pairs claimed by our matrix among published signs: OURS_SUPPORTED iff n>=4 & acc>=0.75; OURS_REFUTED iff n>=4 & acc<=0.5; OURS_MIXED else; NO_POWER iff n<4; exact binomial p, Brier, log-score reported
scoring_rule.sub2_head_to_head: shared pairs with Corazza tier-1: accuracy comparison, n>=4 required
scoring_rule.sub3_divergent_pairs: frozen divergence_registry pairs present in the sequence: per-pair winner
scoring_rule.multiplicity: one prediction system; sub-test 1 is the headline; sub-tests 2-3 Holm-corrected family of 2; Corazza tier-2 pairs reported outside gates
void_conditions: V2 fewer than 2 scoreable pairs after mapping
V3 ed.pr. asserts non-value-ordered and prints no ordering
V4 contamination: any repo session reads ed.pr. face-δ content before a scoring plan freeze -> verdict capped DESCRIPTIVE, session id recorded
scoring_rule.failure_is_real: OURS_REFUTED is a publishable negative for the sequence-order channel (Art. XVII: cannot be amended into a success)

calibration_estimates_non_binding.p_no_power_sub1: ~0.3-0.4 (six signs may fall outside our claimed-letter set {J,JE,E,B,K,L2,L4,L6,H,A})
calibration_estimates_non_binding.expected_acc_if_corazza_tier12_true: 13/15 direct claims concordant with Corazza; the 2 divergent pairs (H>K, A>B) would fail

C1.public_passage: This sequence of fractions is a most important aspect of this document.

C3.note: counts only; fringe content not read into any session context

C4.assertion: this module opens only corpus/silver + register/PDF for contamination checks; no anetaki content enters the derivation functions

C5.search_receipt: EPOCH-001 result.json search_receipt (14 routes, 2026-07-08); no new search run

trigger_protocol: identical to CONTAMINATION_BOUNDARY.md: on Anetaki II publication, freeze a scoring session plan FIRST, then ingest mechanically, then run score_sequence; never read face-δ content in an analysis session before that
